artifact_summary: Hazens SCADA Standards Appendix A page displaying generator and MCC panel states, contrasting normal operation with fault conditions via red borders and alarm icons.
artifact_blurb: This Hazens SCADA Standards Appendix A documentation page features four screenshots depicting SCADA interface states for miscellaneous equipment. The visualizations include graphical representations of a generator and an MCC panel, explicitly contrasting standard operational statuses with fault conditions highlighted by red borders and alarm icons.
